findings.description: The knowledge file corrected a typo from the source. Source has '含まれてています' (double て), knowledge file has '含まれています'. While this is an obvious typo, the example text was modified from the verbatim source.
findings.source_evidence: Source: "{0}に許容されない文字が含まれてています。" / Knowledge: "{0}に許容されない文字が含まれています。"

findings.description: Several PascalCase class names and annotation names referenced in the section content are missing from hints: YYYYMMDDConvertor (used in extendedStringConvertors code example), ExtendedStringConvertor (interface mentioned in extendedStringConvertors property description), @YYYYMMDD (annotation in Java Form class example), @PropertyName (annotation in Java Form class example).
findings.source_evidence: Source references: 'ExtendedStringConvertorインタフェースを実装したクラス', 'nablarch.common.date.YYYYMMDDConvertor', '@PropertyName("日付")', '@YYYYMMDD(allowFomat = "yyyy/MM/dd")'
